fearGreedIndex.label: Extreme Fear
fearGreedIndex.note: CNN F&G Index at 18 (Extreme Fear). 4th consecutive week in Fear/Extreme Fear. Oil above $100, Iran-Hormuz crisis, mortgage rates 6.11%. Crypto F&G at 15.

newPosts.title: Weekly Intelligence Briefing (13 March 2026)
newPosts.summary: Fear Gauge at 83/100 (PANIC). Oil closed above $100 for first time since 2022. IEA calling this 'largest disruption in history to oil supplies.' Iran running selective blockade — still shipping 11.7M barrels to China. Safe-Haven Demand collapsed from 40 to 18. Russia earning extra $150M/day.

newPosts.title: The Most Asymmetric Bet in China AI (VNET Group)
newPosts.summary: Deep dive on VNET Group — China's largest carrier-neutral DC operator. ByteDance signed 500MW deal. Wholesale IDC growing ~96% y/y. China DC market projected to triple to RMB 1.1T by 2030. US chip restrictions a tailwind — domestic AI chips consume ~70% more electricity.

newPosts.title: The $7tn Oil & Gas Primer
newPosts.summary: Massive deep dive into the $7T global oil & gas industry. Core thesis: Peak Oil Supply Growth > Peak Oil Demand. $1T upstream capex slashed 2015-2021. Industry consuming reserves 3x faster than discovering. AI + Grid Supercycle structurally relies on hydrocarbons.

newPosts.title: ISSC Thesis: Up 35% in 30 Days
newPosts.summary: Innovative Aerosystems (ISSC) — from $20.77 to $28.10 (+35%) in 30 days. Revenue doubled 2023-2025, EBITDA tripled, profit quadrupled. Gross margins 54.5%. Defense tailwinds (F-16 programs).

newPosts.title: The Jagged Frontier Was a Measurement Error
newPosts.summary: Cursor's coding harness solved a research-grade spectral graph theory problem after 4 days — improved on human solution. The skill that survives is evaluating whether work is correct, not doing the work. METR data: task completion horizons doubling every 4-7 months.

newPosts.title: Gubernatio delenda est
newPosts.summary: Tim Price draws parallels between current commodity boom and 1970s stagflation. Recipe for historic real asset rally: multiple foreign wars, insufficient energy/materials capex, currency devaluation, unsustainable government debt. Silver broke through 45-year cup-and-handle formation.

newPosts.title: AI GTM Playbook Reveals How New Startups Scale Fast
newPosts.summary: AI-driven GTM strategies replacing classic SaaS sales playbook. Clay and ElevenLabs using signal-based outbound, PLG handoffs, AI SDRs. Lovable hits $400M ARR. Anthropic sues Trump admin. Nscale reaches $14.6B valuation.

newPosts.title: 80+ Ways to Fund Your Startup Without Giving Up a Single Share
newPosts.summary: Database of 80+ non-dilutive funding sources across 9 categories. RBF market hit $5.8B in 2024 growing ~70%/yr. US venture debt $27.8B. Cloud credits worth $800K+. Stacking strategy: $1.05M+ at 0% dilution.

newPosts.title: In China, a Crooked Horse Brings Your Booze in 15 minutes
newPosts.summary: Meituan's 'Waima' instant alcohol delivery — 2,200+ warehouses, 15-min delivery. Nighttime orders 68%. Alcohol delivery market projected >RMB 100B by 2027 (6% penetration). Walmart China RMB 170.6B revenue in 2025.

macroOverview.keyRisk: Oil above $100 for first time since 2022. IEA: 'largest disruption in history to oil supplies.' Global liquidity down 4% on 3-month SAAR (42 Macro).
macroOverview.watch: Iran selective blockade — still shipping to China through Hormuz. Russia earning extra $150M/day. Global energy markets fracturing into competing spheres of influence.

keyThemes: Oil Above $100: Brent crossed $100 for first time since 2022. IEA calls it 'largest disruption in history.' Iran selective blockade still ships to China.
Global Liquidity Breaking Down: 42 Macro's Darius Dale — liquidity down 4% SAAR. All counter-cyclical indicators (USD, vol, energy) flashing bearish for liquidity.
China AI Infrastructure Boom: VNET Group as asymmetric play. ByteDance 500MW deal. China DC market to triple to RMB 1.1T by 2030.
1970s Stagflation Parallels: Tim Price draws direct parallels — multiple wars, insufficient capex, currency devaluation, unsustainable debt. Silver 45-year breakout.
AI Execution Cost Collapse: Cursor solved research-grade math problem in 4 days. The skill that survives is evaluation, not execution. Task horizons doubling every 4-7 months.
